title: Dorvalla Incident
content:

Chancellor Valorum]]''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' |image= |name=Dorvalla Incident |conflict=[[Grand Plan/Legends|Grand Plan]] |date=[[33 BBY/Legends|32.5 BBY]] |place=[[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]] |result=[[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]] victory |side1=Nebula Front |side2=*[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] *[[Dorvalla Mining]] |side3=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side4= *[[OLR-4]] |commanders3=[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2=*[[Trade Defense Force]] *[[Dorvalla Space Corps]] |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Tempest-class gunship|''Tempest''-class gunship]] **[[Hawk-Bat (gunship)|''Hawk-Bat'']] *1 shuttle *12 mercenary infiltration commandos *[[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] *[[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighters]] |forces2=*[[Lucrehulk-class LH-3210 cargo freighter/Legends|2 ''Lucrehulk''-class freighters]] **[[Acquisitor (Lucrehulk-class battleship)|''Acquisitor'']] **''[[Revenue]]'' *Picket ships *[[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Variable Geometry Self-Propelled Battle Droid, Mark Is]] *[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|Security droids]] *1 [[CL-1c Lancet interceptor|Lancet]] |forces3=*2 [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] |forces4= |casual1=*Shuttle *At least 1 Z-95 *At least 2 CloakShapes *9 commandos |casual2=*''Revenue'' (with cargo and droids) *At least 4 DSC picket ships *Security and Vulture droids |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} The '''Dorvalla Incident''' marked a new development in the activities of the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]] group. ==Prelude== {{Quote|I have been anticipating your visit, Lord Sidious. Though I confess that I had no idea you were aware of events on Dorvalla, much less that the Trade Federation had an interest in the planet."
"You will find that there are few matters of which I am unaware, Viceroy. What's more, we have not seen the last of Dorvalla. There is something we will need to attend to in due course.|Nute Gunray and Darth Sidious after the Trade Federation gained the rights to shipping and distribution of lommite ore on Dorvalla|"[[Darth Maul: Saboteur]]"}} As part of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Grand Plan/Legends|Grand Plan]], the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] sought to secure his influence on [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]], the [[Viceroy/Legends|viceroy]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]], and, in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], saw an opportunity on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dorvalla/Legends|Dorvalla]]. Two rival mining companies on Dorvalla, [[InterGalactic Ore]] and [[Lommite Limited]], had been sabotaging the other's [[Lommite]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] shipments, a conflict to which Sidious sent his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]], [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]. Maul exacerbated the conflict through covert sabotage and deception, causing both companies to lose [[Transport/Legends|transports]], thus inhibiting their ability to deliver ore to their buyers. As a result, Lommite Limited [[Executive officer/Legends|Executive officer]] [[Jurnel Arrant]] proposed that the two companies to merge to become [[Dorvalla Mining]], and arranged for the Trade Federation to represent Dorvalla in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and receive exclusive shipping and distribution rights to Dorvalla's ore. Gunray discussed the developments with Sidious, who assured him that their business with Dorvalla was not over. With the rise of the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front's]] militant wing under [[Havac]] ([[Eru Matalis]]), the Front decided to hire the notable mercenary [[Arwen Cohl]] and his team to engage in actual violent confrontation against the Trade Federation and its allies. ==The incident== The damage done to the Federation was physically small—it lost several droids, one of thousands of bulk freighters, a cargo of [[Lommite/Legends|lommite ore]] that was recovered, and a shipment of [[Aurodium/Legends|aurodium]], the most valuable item on the freighter. However, both Cohl and the Nebula Front's militant wing gained new-found respect in the eyes of those oppressed by the Trade Federation, and were viewed with a new sense of urgency by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] (whose Knights, [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], had been present at the attack, albeit undercover). ==Aftermath== The newly-perceived dangers of the Front inspired [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]] to order militarization of Federation ships and the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] to consider taxation of trade routes in response, both of which led to the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]]—which itself led to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Blockade of Naboo]]. In addition, the stolen aurodium later found its way into the [[InterGalactic Bank]] account of [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]], an event that sparked a scandal and paved the way to ease his removal from office. ==Appearances== *[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *"[[Darth Maul: Saboteur]]" {{1st}} *''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' *''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|13|NAB 7-10|The Naboo Blockade}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *{{FactFile|47|UND 1-2|Luminara Unduli}} *{{FactFile|57|NUT 5-8|Nute Gunray}} *{{FactFile|65|VAL 5-6|Finis Valorum}} {{1stID|Dorvalla Incident}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' *{{FactFile|92|BLA 1-4|Black Sun}} *{{FactFile|135|DOF 1-2|Daultay Dofine}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|character|nutegunray|Gunray, Nute}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *{{FactFile2014|33|GUN 1-6|Nute Gunray}} *{{FactFile2014|54|UND 1-4|Luminara Unduli}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Dorvalla#legends |es=Incidente en Dorvalla |deFA=1 }} [[Category:Battles in the Videnda sector]] [[Category:Battles of the Nebula Front crisis]]
